name: DefinitionExtractExtension
title: Extract Definition
description: Specifies the resource type/profile for the definition based extraction of a resource and optionally the `fullUrl` and other `Bundle.entry.request` properties as needed.

element.short: Details for a definition based resource extraction
element.definition: Specifies the resource type/profile for the definition based extraction of a resource and optionally the `fullUrl` and other `Bundle.entry.request` properties as needed.

constraint.human: All FHIR elements must have a @value or children
Must have either extensions or value[x], not both

element.definition: Unique id for the element within a resource (for internal references). This may be any string value that does not contain spaces.

slicing.description: Extensions are always sliced by (at least) url

element.definition: An Extension

constraint.human: All FHIR elements must have a @value or children
Must have either extensions or value[x], not both

element.short: Canonical URL of Resource type or profile to extract
element.definition: The resource type/profile canonical Url defining the resource type to be extracted.
element.comment:
The canonical URL for a base resource can be used if a specific profile is not required, e.g. `http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Patient`.

  The value used here will be the prefix value (before the #) in any child items `definition` value.

  Where a specific profile is used (not the base resource), then this canonical value will be set in the created resource's `meta.profile` collection.

constraint.human: All FHIR elements must have a @value or children
Must have either extensions or value[x], not both

element.definition: Unique id for the element within a resource (for internal references). This may be any string value that does not contain spaces.

slicing.description: Extensions are always sliced by (at least) url

element.definition: An Extension

constraint.human: All FHIR elements must have a @value or children
Must have either extensions or value[x], not both

element.short: identifies the meaning of the extension
element.definition: Source of the definition for the extension code - a logical name or a URL.
element.comment: The definition may point directly to a computable or human-readable definition of the extensibility codes, or it may be a logical URI as declared in some other specification. The definition SHALL be a URI for the Structure Definition defining the extension.

element.definition: Value of extension - must be one of a constrained set of the data types (see [Extensibility](http://hl7.org/fhir/R4/extensibility.html) for a list).

constraint.human: All FHIR elements must have a @value or children

element.short: A fhirpath expression to evaluate to populate the fullUrl property in the `Bundle.entry` (uri/string result)
element.definition: A fhirpath expression to evaluate to extract the value into the fullUrl property. If no value is evaluated, then the element is not extracted.
